title: Vandalizer to Cambium handoff (solicitation rules)
description: The structured solicitation rules an extraction tool such as AI4RA Vandalizer can hand to Cambium. A file that validates against this schema can be passed directly to tools/budget_review.py as --rules, with no manual conversion. Extraction is Vandalizer's job; this schema only fixes the shape of the handoff so the two tools interoperate (AI4RA Pillar: Flexibility).

solicitation_id.description: Funder opportunity or NOFO identifier, for traceability.

fa_rate_cap.description: Maximum allowed facilities and administrative (indirect) rate, as a fraction or percent matching the budget file's convention. Null if the solicitation states no cap.

total_cost_ceiling.description: Maximum total award cost. Null if uncapped.

period_months_max.description: Maximum project period in months. Null if unspecified.

required_budget_sections.description: Budget sections the solicitation requires, for example personnel, fringe, equipment, travel, indirect.

disallowed_categories.description: Cost categories the solicitation does not allow.

cost_share_required.description: Whether the solicitation requires cost share.
